info.name: JobTrakr API
info.description: Week 3 deliverable: full REST API coverage for JobTrakr — auth, applications, interviews, contacts, and skills. Each entity folder includes one happy-path request plus at least 3 error cases (validation, not-found, unauthorized).

request.description: Creates a fresh user. Delete the user in Atlas or change the email if re-running.
Assumes the seed script has already run so this email exists.
Saves the JWT into the {{token}} collection variable for every other request in this collection.

item.name: Get current user (me) - error: no token
Get current user (me) - error: malformed token
Create application - error: invalid status enum
Create application - error: no auth token
Get single application - error: not found
Update application - error: invalid workType enum

request.description: Run this last — it deletes the application created at the top of this folder.

item.name: Setup: create an application to attach interviews to
Create interview - error: invalid application id
Create interview - error: application belongs to another user

request.description: A well-formed but non-existent/foreign application id should be rejected, not silently linked.

item.name: List interviews filtered by applicationId - happy path
Update interview - error: invalid selfRating range
Create contact - error: invalid email format
Create contact - error: invalid relationship enum
Create skill - error: invalid category enum
Create skill - error: duplicate name for same user

request.description: Run after the happy-path create above — same name for the same user should be rejected.

item.name: Update skill - error: invalid proficiency enum
